title: incadendron esseri
intro: Incadendron esseri, also known as the Kadupul flower or Queen of the Night, is a rare and exotic orchid species native to Sri Lanka. This plant is prized for its unique ability to bloom only at night and wilt before dawn, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Incadendron esseri include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Sri Lankan medicine.
